module Acme.Shape (area) where

data Shape = Circle Double | Square Double | Triangle Double Double

area :: Shape -> Double
area (Circle r)   = pi * r * r
area (Square s)   = s * s

module Acme.Shape (area) where

data Shape = Circle Double | Square Double | Triangle Double Double

area :: Shape -> Double
area (Circle r)       = pi * r * r
area (Square s)       = s * s
area (Triangle b h)   = 0.5 * b * h
